aboutPage.title: About MMKK AI
aboutPage.subtitle: The business technology partner behind growing companies in Myanmar and Thailand.
aboutPage.body1: MMKK AI was built to close a specific gap: businesses in Myanmar and Thailand need Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, HubSpot, Apollo, Google Cloud, and AI automation set up correctly and supported locally — not a generic offshore support ticket queue.
aboutPage.body2: As an official Google Cloud Co-Sell Partner and Microsoft Azure Deployment Partner, we combine verified platform expertise with on-the-ground support across our offices in the US, Thailand, and Myanmar.

landingPage.ctaSubtitle: Book a free consultation and we'll scope your setup within one business day.
